ERAM.

The Eram Sports Arena

A New Stage
of Scale.

A 1,000-seat open-air amphitheatre and multi-court venue designed to elevate competitive sport, cultural engagement, and large-scale campus events. A flagship infrastructure milestone within the ERAM ecosystem.

At a Glance

Seating Capacity

10,000

sq. ft. Built-Up Area

Amphitheatre Design

High-Intensity LED Floodlights

Infrastructure at a glance

seats

poles

Key Features

DesignedforPerformance&Gathering

Built as a flagship infrastructure milestone within the ERAM ecosystem, the Arena represents the Trust's expanding vision — where structured development meets public-scale possibility.

ARENACOURTSLIGHTSSECURE
04 / 04

Secure & Accessible Infrastructure

The Arena integrates essential support systems ensuring smooth, safe, and efficient operation for every event — whether institutional or public. Safety, accessibility, and operational efficiency are embedded into its design from the ground up.

Car Parking50+ Vehicles
SecurityCCTV Surveillance
AccessControlled Campus Entry
03 / 04

Event-Ready Illumination

Equipped with a full floodlighting system, the Arena enables evening matches, large-scale programs, and extended event scheduling — transforming the venue into a fully functional day-to-night event space without interruption.

Floodlight Poles8 Poles (10m Height)
LED Lights38 High-Intensity Units
OperationDay to Night Capable
02 / 04

Multi-Court Sports Layout

At its core, the Arena integrates a competitive multi-court system that supports structured training, competitive matches, and tournament-level play. Designed to transition seamlessly between practice, competition, and event configurations.

Primary Court47m × 22m
Badminton Court13.40m × 6.10m
ConfigurationMulti-Sport Ready
01 / 04

Open-Air Amphitheatre

With a seating capacity of 1,000, the Arena is designed as an open-air amphitheatre that accommodates large audiences while maintaining clear sightlines and gathering scale. Its architectural layout enables visibility, flow, and shared experience — for sporting events, convocations, or cultural programs.

Capacity1,000 Spectators
FormatOpen-Air Design
SightlinesUnobstructed, All Tiers

Integrated with the ERAM Ecosystem

Anchored In Structured
sports Development

The Arena operates in alignment with the ERAM institutional ecosystem, reinforcing the Trust's long-standing commitment to youth development. It is not a standalone facility — it is the physical expression of a broader educational philosophy.

“The Arena transforms training into performance, and performance into opportunity.”

  • Structured sports training environments for all institutions
  • Competitive exposure platforms at campus scale
  • Professional-grade infrastructure accessible to every student
  • Seamless integration between academics and sports

5

Institutions directly served by the Arena

2026

Development milestone for the ERAM campus

1,000

Seat capacity for competitive events

EASE

Academy for Sports & Excellence — Est. 2015

A venue for the wider community

Open Beyond
the Campus.

The ERAM Sports Arena extends beyond institutional use. It is open for external bookings, welcoming a wide range of large-scale events and community gatherings.

By positioning the campus as an accessible venue for sport, culture, and community, the Arena strengthens ERAM's presence within the wider region — as an institution that serves beyond its walls.

Enquire About Hosting→

Multi-sport competitive formats

The scale at a glance

A Landmark Addition
to the ERAM Campus.

Every dimension of the ERAM Sports Arena is intentional — built for competitive performance, extended events, and long-term community use. These are not provisional specifications. They are a permanent statement of scale.

Spectator Capacity

1,000

Open-air amphitheatre seating for large-scale events

Built-up Area

10,000 sq.ft.

Total infrastructure footprint across the Arena complex

Primary Multi-Court

47 × 22 m

Competition-grade multi-sport court at the arena's core

Badminton Court

13.40 × 6.10 m

Regulation-dimension dedicated badminton court

Floodlighting

8 Poles · 38 LEDs

10-metre poles with high-intensity LED coverage for night events

Parking & Security

50+ Bays

Dedicated parking with CCTV surveillance and controlled access

Where Sport, Ceremony, and Gathering Unfold.

The ERAM Sports Arena extends the campus into a space of scale. Its open-air amphitheatre and floodlit multi-court design reflect a long-term vision: to create infrastructure that supports performance, visibility, and shared experience. As both sports ground and event venue, the Arena strengthens the campus as a space built for participation and presence.

"Built not for scale alone — but for sustained opportunity: sports, cultural, and communal."

To empower and excel students to acquire value based quality education providing an equal nurturing grounds for the overall growth and development of our students.
